    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    Car
    Car.java Code Description: Represents a car object in the game.
    CarController
    CarController.java Code Description: Controls the main game loop and user input for the car simulation.
    CheckPointGroups
    CheckPointGroups.java Code Description: Groups connected checkpoint tiles by scanning for zones and mapping every tile in each zone to a checkpoint group number.
    PixelDriftGUI
    PixelDriftGUI.java Code Description: This is the GUI class that will run the Pixel Drift Game
    Tile
    Tile.java Code Description: This class represents a single Tile/Pixel of the track.
    Tile.Surface
    Enumeration to store surface data
    Track
    Track.java Code Description: This class represents a Track in Java.
    TrackDrawerGUI
    TrackDrawerGUI.java Code description: This program allows me to visually edit a track so I can generate new tracks.
    TrackGenerator
    TrackGenerator.java Code Description: This class generates files for track generation.
    TrackPackageTest
    TrackPackageTest.java Code Description: This is the test class for all classes that can be tested in the track package.
    TrackPanel
    TrackPanel.java Code Description: This class represents the visual Track.
    VelocityVector
    VelocityVector.java Code Description: Represents a 2D vector used for movement and physics calculations.
